info.name: AutoDJ (Script)
info.author: Byron Xu, Sophia Herzog, rdircio
info.description: AutoDJ script with configurable options. Use with a MIDI loopback device (e.g. IAC Driver on macOS, loopMIDI on Windows) so Mixxx loads this mapping; then adjust settings below or in the script.

option.label: Exit hotcue number
option.description: Hotcue used for the exit point (where the current track ends the mix).

option.label: Pre-start (beats)
option.description: Beats before the exit point to begin the transition. Allowed: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64.

option.label: Next track beat offset
option.description: Beats before/after the next track mix-in point. 0 = on the point; negative = skip intro beats; positive = lead-in (use with care).

option.label: Use Intro Start as entrance
option.description: When the next track has Intro Start set, use it as the mix-in point instead of main cue.

option.label: Use Outro Start for exit
option.description: When the current track has Outro Start set, use it as the exit point instead of the exit hotcue.

option.label: Fallback to track start
option.description: When neither intro nor main cue is set, start from track start so the transition still works.

option.label: Snap to first beat
option.description: When using fallback, snap to the first beat of the first bar using the beatgrid.

option.label: Align beatgrid at entrance
option.description: Align the beatgrid to the entrance (main cue or Intro Start) so the grid matches the real downbeat.

option.label: Use EQ during transition
option.description: Fade bass out on outgoing track and in on incoming track during the mix.

option.label: Normal bass level
option.description: Target bass EQ level after the transition (1.0 = unity).

option.label: Normal treble level
option.description: Target treble EQ level after the transition.

option.label: Bass restore step
option.description: Step per tick when ramping bass to normal during the transition.

option.label: Hold source full (ticks)
option.description: Ticks to keep crossfader at full source at the start of the fade (~1 tick/sec).

option.label: Drive crossfader when deck in loop
option.description: When the outgoing deck has a beatloop, drive the crossfader so the transition still completes.

option.label: Drive duration (seconds)
option.description: Desired transition duration in seconds when driving crossfader (outgoing deck in loop). Match AutoDJ UI duration (e.g. 35).

option.label: Randomize transition style
option.description: Randomize EQ on/off, EQ speed, and beats-before-entrance each transition.

option.label: Random EQ chance
option.description: Probability (0–1) of using EQ when randomTransitions is on (e.g. 0.85 = 85% EQ, 15% pure crossfade).

option.label: Random EQ step min
option.description: Min EQ fade step per tick when randomizing.

option.label: Random EQ step max
option.description: Max EQ fade step per tick when randomizing.

option.label: Log random choices
option.description: Print each transition's random choices to the Mixxx log (Debug).

option.label: Random effect during fade
option.description: Apply one random effect (FX1/FX2, slot 1–3) to the outgoing deck during the crossfade.

option.label: Random effect chance
option.description: Probability (0–1) of applying an effect this transition when random effect is on.

option.label: Effect mix min
option.description: Min unit mix (dry/wet) for the random effect.

option.label: Effect mix max
option.description: Max unit mix for the random effect.

option.label: Effect slot wet min
option.description: Min effect slot wet (parameter1) per transition.

option.label: Effect slot wet max
option.description: Max effect slot wet per transition.

option.label: Log effect activation
option.description: Print when an effect unit is activated/deactivated (Mixxx log).

option.label: Max BPM adjustment (%)
option.description: Maximum percentage BPM change allowed to sync beats (e.g. 12 = 12%). Tracks outside this are skipped.

option.label: Harmonic mixing (transpose)
option.description: Transpose the next track to match the current track's key during the mix.

option.label: Max transposition (semitones)
option.description: Maximum semitones to transpose for key matching.

option.label: Restore key after fade
option.description: After the transition, restore the new track to its original key.

option.label: Avoid tracks played in last (minutes)
option.description: Skip tracks that were played in the last N minutes (0 = disabled). The script keeps its own cache; Mixxx also updates last played in the library.
